emojis.title: Stay Sharp
emojis.description: You opened this for a reason. Don't forget it.

emojis.title: Still Worth It?
emojis.description: Is this specific video actually improving your life?

emojis.title: Slippery Slope
emojis.description: It starts with one video. It ends with a wasted hour.

emojis.title: You vs You
emojis.description: The only person holding you back right now is you.

emojis.title: Disappointed
emojis.description: We expected better from you today.

emojis.title: Anxiety Loading
emojis.description: Procrastination is just borrowing anxiety from the future.

emojis.title: Red Flag
emojis.description: This behavior is a red flag for your future success.

emojis.title: Sickening
emojis.description: It's actually gross how much time you are wasting.

emojis.title: Send Help
emojis.description: You clearly can't stop yourself. It's sad.

emojis.title: Be A Winner
emojis.description: Winners know when to quit. Quit now.

emojis.title: You Lied
emojis.description: You set a limit and you broke it. Shame.

emojis.title: Conscious Scroll
emojis.description: Are you scrolling, or is the app scrolling you? Stay awake.

emojis.title: Laying Bricks
emojis.description: Are you building a wall of excuses or a bridge to success?

emojis.title: Bored Yet?
emojis.description: If you are bored, close the app. Don't punish yourself.

emojis.title: Spiral Alert
emojis.description: You are circling the drain of unproductivity.

emojis.title: Stock Crash
emojis.description: Your productivity stock just took a massive dip.

emojis.title: Downhill
emojis.description: It's all downhill from here. Stop while you have dignity.

emojis.title: Rock Bottom
emojis.description: You are digging a hole. Stop digging.

emojis.title: Time Police
emojis.description: You are under arrest for murdering your own time.

emojis.title: Get It Together
emojis.description: This performance is poop. Improve.

emojis.title: Limit Reached
emojis.description: You hit your limit. Don't be a sheep. Leave.

emojis.title: Clown World
emojis.description: You are the mayor of Clown Town right now.

emojis.title: Own Your Time
emojis.description: Lions don't concern themselves with the opinions of sheep (or algorithms).

emojis.title: Energy Check
emojis.description: Is this recharging you, or draining your motivation?

emojis.title: Distraction Trap
emojis.description: You are falling for the trap. Climb out while you can.

emojis.title: Potential Wilting
emojis.description: Your talent is withering while you watch this.

emojis.title: Zombie Mode
emojis.description: Lights are on, but nobody is home. Wake up.

emojis.title: Hard Pill
emojis.description: You are avoiding your problems. They are still there.

emojis.title: Liar Liar
emojis.description: You promised yourself you wouldn't do this.

emojis.title: Garbage Day
emojis.description: You are filling your mind with absolute trash.

emojis.title: Brain Rot
emojis.description: It's terminal. You are turning into a zombie.

emojis.title: Be Free
emojis.description: The shackles are off. Go create something beautiful.

emojis.title: Weakness
emojis.description: This is pure weakness. Be stronger.

emojis.title: Be Intentional
emojis.description: Don't let your eyes glaze over. Keep your mind active.

emojis.title: Trash or Treasure?
emojis.description: Most of this feed is junk. Sift for the gold and leave.

emojis.title: Don't Take The Bait
emojis.description: The algorithm is fishing for your attention. Don't bite.

emojis.title: Say No
emojis.description: Saying no to this app means saying yes to your life.

emojis.title: Bin Habits
emojis.description: Throw this habit in the trash where it belongs.

emojis.title: Sleepwalking
emojis.description: You are sleepwalking through your potential.

emojis.title: Clowning Around
emojis.description: Your goals are laughing at you right now.

emojis.title: Dead Dreams
emojis.description: This is where dreams go to die. On a glowing screen.

emojis.title: Implosion
emojis.description: Your day is imploding. Evacuate.

emojis.title: The Door
emojis.description: Walk through it. The real world is better.

emojis.title: Wasted
emojis.description: You are wasting your life. It's not funny anymore.

emojis.title: Build, Don't Consume
emojis.description: Every minute here is a minute not building your empire.

emojis.title: Tick Tock
emojis.description: That was 4 minutes. You can never earn them back.

emojis.title: Flex Your Will
emojis.description: Your willpower is a muscle. Exercise it by closing this.

emojis.title: Soft Life?
emojis.description: Do you want a soft life or a successful life? Choose.

emojis.title: Heartbreaking
emojis.description: It breaks our heart to see you waste your talent.

emojis.title: Put. It. Down.
emojis.description: We are asking nicely. Please.

emojis.title: Dilapidated
emojis.description: Your discipline is crumbling. Repair it.

emojis.title: Withered
emojis.description: Your motivation is shriveling up.

emojis.title: Addict
emojis.description: Yeah, we said it. Prove us wrong.

emojis.title: Promise Kept
emojis.description: You promised to stop here. Keep your word.

emojis.title: Lost Cause
emojis.description: We tried to warn you. You didn't listen.

emojis.title: Grow Through It
emojis.description: Use this for inspiration, not procrastination.

emojis.title: Discipline
emojis.description: Discipline is choosing what you want most over what you want now.

emojis.title: Standard Drop
emojis.description: You have high standards. This content is lowering them.

emojis.title: Life is Short
emojis.description: Too short to spend it watching strangers dance.

emojis.title: Halfway Point
emojis.description: You are deep in it now. Turn back before it's too late.

emojis.title: Parasite
emojis.description: This app is feeding off your energy.

emojis.title: Predators
emojis.description: Marketers love users like you. Don't be prey.

emojis.title: Hot Mess
emojis.description: Get it together. This is embarrassing.

emojis.title: Lazy Bones
emojis.description: The laziness is seeping into your marrow.

emojis.title: Hero Arc
emojis.description: The hero leaves the cave. Be the hero.

emojis.title: Pathetic
emojis.description: Harsh? Maybe. True? Yes. Close the app.

emojis.title: Focus Check
emojis.description: Are you actually watching, or just zoning out?

emojis.title: Don't Get Comfy
emojis.description: Comfort zones are where dreams go to die.

emojis.title: Brain Fog
emojis.description: Can you feel your clarity fading? That's the dopamine hit.

emojis.title: Disconnect to Connect
emojis.description: Your real life connections are waiting.

emojis.title: Lost The Plot
emojis.description: You had a plan for today. This was not it.

emojis.title: Hit The Wall
emojis.description: You've seen enough. There is nothing new here.

emojis.title: Smooth Brain
emojis.description: You are smoothing out your brain wrinkles. Stop.

emojis.title: Slave to the Scroll
emojis.description: Break the chains. Be free.

emojis.title: Failure Mode
emojis.description: This is what failure looks like. Close the app.

emojis.title: New Day
emojis.description: Start fresh. Close the app.

emojis.title: Get Out
emojis.description: You don't belong here anymore. Go.

emojis.title: You Are Valuable
emojis.description: Your time is worth more than these 15-second clips.

emojis.title: Small Minds
emojis.description: Small minds discuss people (and reels). Great minds discuss ideas.

emojis.title: Walk Away
emojis.description: The most powerful move you can make right now is leaving.

emojis.title: Cringe
emojis.description: Imagine explaining to your future self why you watched this.

emojis.title: Actions Speak
emojis.description: Your actions are screaming 'I don't want to succeed'.

emojis.title: Burning Out
emojis.description: You are burning daylight.

emojis.title: So Slow
emojis.description: You are moving towards your dreams at snail speed.

emojis.title: No Words
emojis.description: We are speechless at your lack of control.

emojis.title: We See You
emojis.description: And we are judging you hard.

emojis.title: Mission Complete
emojis.description: You came, you saw, you are leaving. Good.

emojis.title: Time Death
emojis.description: You killed the time. It's dead. Are you happy?

emojis.title: Guard Your Mind
emojis.description: Don't let the junk get in. Filter what you see.

emojis.title: Run Your Race
emojis.description: Stop watching others run theirs.

emojis.title: Lying to Yourself
emojis.description: You said 'just a few minutes'. Be honest.

emojis.title: Wash It Off
emojis.description: You need a mental shower after this much content.

emojis.title: Cold Truth
emojis.description: Nobody is coming to save you. You have to save yourself.

emojis.title: Goodbye?
emojis.description: Are you going to leave, or do we have to force you?

emojis.title: Cobwebs
emojis.description: Your ambition is gathering dust.

emojis.title: Dry Spell
emojis.description: Your productivity is in a drought.

emojis.title: Storm Coming
emojis.description: The regret storm is approaching.

emojis.title: Recharged
emojis.description: You have had your fill. Go use that energy.

emojis.title: Zero Willpower
emojis.description: You have zero self-control. Prove us wrong.

emojis.title: Bright Future
emojis.description: Your goals are waiting for you. Don't keep them waiting too long.

emojis.title: Be The 1%
emojis.description: The 1% don't doomscroll. They create.

emojis.title: Gambling Time
emojis.description: You're betting your future on cheap entertainment.

emojis.title: Chains
emojis.description: You are chaining yourself to the screen. Break free.

emojis.title: Spectator
emojis.description: Stop watching life and go live it.

emojis.title: Do Better
emojis.description: You know you are capable of more than this.

emojis.title: Enough
emojis.description: Seriously. That is enough.

emojis.title: STOP NOW
emojis.description: Not in 5 minutes. NOW.

emojis.title: Last Chance
emojis.description: Redeem yourself. Leave now.

emojis.title: HARD STOP
emojis.description: No excuses. No 'one more'. Done.

emojis.title: Leave!
emojis.description: Why are you still here?!
